summary: Iteration 226 — All 3 pre-launch sprint fixes verified: (1) PersonalisedBreedSection fetches ALL 39 Indie breed products (no pillar filter) and shows 2-column grid with 12 picks sorted by learn-pillar first, (2) Admin AIImagePromptField pre-fills with buildDefaultPrompt() based on product name/pillar and is fully editable, (3) onImageGenerated uses setProduct(prev=>{...}) functional update to atomically update all image URL fields. 13/13 backend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: SoulMadeModal uses /api/mockups/breed-products (different endpoint than /api/breed-catalogue/products) — both confirmed working
PersonalisedBreedSection.jsx line 217: gridTemplateColumns 'repeat(2, 1fr)' confirmed in DOM on 390px mobile viewport

ProductBoxEditor.jsx onImageGenerated callback (lines 1677-1688) uses setProduct(prev=>{...}) functional update — atomically updates image, image_url, thumbnail, watercolor_image, cloudinary_url, media.primary_image, media.images — Race condition fix confirmed
AIImagePromptField.jsx buildDefaultPrompt() correctly builds pillar-specific prompts: celebrate pillar → 'Festive product photo of [name], pet celebration item, pastel balloons...' — CONFIRMED via UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration 226 sprint fixes verified: (1) /api/breed-catalogue/products?breed=Indie&limit=40 returns 39 products across all pillars (celebrate, play, dine, learn, go etc.) — NOT filtered by pillar. Frontend PersonalisedBreedSection shows repeat(2, 1fr) 2-column grid with 12 picks (header says '12 personalised picks by Mira'), learn-pillar products first (Indie Training Journal appears first). All products are Indie-specific (breed isolation works). (2) Admin Product Box → Edit → Media tab: AIImagePromptField pre-fills with pillar-based prompt e.g., 'Festive product photo of Akita · Designer Bandana · Birthday Edition, pet celebration item, pastel balloons, confetti, soft pink/gold tones'. Prompt is editable. Generate with AI button enabled. Warning 'This product already has an image. Generating will replace it.' shown when product has existing image. (3) setProduct(prev=>{...}) functional update confirmed in ProductBoxEditor.jsx lines 1677-1688. Navigate: /login with member creds → /learn → scroll down → click Soul Made™ tab → see 2-col grid. Admin: /admin → login → Product Box → edit icon on any product → Media tab → AI Image Prompt section.
